task_title: Evaluation — walk-forward validation on universe sweep survivors

gates.name: walk-forward gate
gates.criteria: OverfitFlag = false AND NegativeFoldFlag = false (OverfitFlag fires when AvgOOSSharpe < 50% of AvgISSharpe; NegativeFoldFlag fires when 2+ non-degenerate folds have negative OOS Sharpe)

gates.name: instrument-count gate
gates.criteria: A strategy must pass walk-forward on at least as many instruments as it passed the universe gate — macd-crossover must pass on >=14 instruments, sma-crossover must pass on >=12 instruments

command_run: go run ./cmd/walk-forward --instrument {NSE:X} --from 2018-01-01 --to 2024-01-01 --strategy {macd-crossover|sma-crossover} [--macd-fast-period 17 --macd-slow-period 26 --macd-signal-period 9 | --fast-period 10 --slow-period 20] --commission zerodha_full -- run 26 times (14 MACD + 12 SMA instruments)

macd-crossover.notes: Passes cleanly: 14/15 instruments positive Sharpe, DSRAvg=0.2715 (>0), PassFraction=0.933. Advances to walk-forward on 14 instruments.

sma-crossover.notes: Thin margin: 12/14 sufficient, DSRAvg=0.0969. Walk-forward is key validation. Revisit trigger: if <6 instruments pass walk-forward, reconsider portfolio inclusion.

verdicts.marcus: completed — both strategies killed at instrument-count gate. MACD: 9/14 instruments pass WF gate (needs 14). SMA: 4/12 pass (needs 12). See strategy_verdicts for per-instrument detail.

notes.data_freshness: Cache files under .cache/zerodha/ last modified 2026-04-29. All fold-range windows served from cache. No live API calls required.
notes.instrument_count_gate_note: The instrument-count gate requires 100% retention — strategy must pass WF on as many instruments as it passed universe gate. This is strict: MACD universe gate passed 14 instruments, WF must also pass 14. MACD passed 9/14 (64%). SMA passed 4/12 (33%). Both killed.
notes.regime_note: Regime gate deferred to TASK-0055 as per 2026-05-03 decision. Does not apply here.
notes.next_steps_note: Both strategies killed. Pipeline from TASK-0052 ends here. TASK-0054 (bootstrap), TASK-0055 (portfolio), TASK-0056 (pre-live brief) should be re-examined. Options: (1) revisit instrument count gate criteria — the 100% retention requirement may be overly strict; (2) investigate whether relaxing instrument eligibility (e.g., MACD advances on 9 survivors); (3) go back to strategy design. This requires user decision before proceeding.
